title: mRemoteNG 1.78.2 NB 3405 (SC) requires .NET 9.0
author: ValleBL
body_snippet: Latest NB Self contained Version "mRemoteNG 1.78.2 NB 3405" still requires .NET 9.0.0 to run.

iterations.description: Bulk verified: commit f61f63c1 exists (HIGH confidence)

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Self-contained build incorrectly requires external .NET 9.0 runtime instead of embedding .NET 10 as expected for SC packages.
Approach: Verify TargetFramework is net10.0 and self-contained publish config correctly sets RuntimeIdentifier and SelfContained=true so the embedded runtime is .NET 10, not a stale .NET 9 reference.
